title: User Portfolio and Preferences - October 2025
outcome: Full portfolio positions retrieved (see portfolio_dict) with allocations, sectors, supporting thesis and metrics, plus explicit user preferences logged. User is 25, net worth $5M, high risk tolerance; wants lower beta and correlation, higher risk-adjusted returns and alpha potential.

title: Optimized Portfolio - October 2025
outcome: New portfolio constructed based on rigorous strengths/weaknesses analysis, systematic risk/correlation/Sharpe filtration, and tool-driven stock/ETF screening; includes explicit list of changes (additions, removals, reweights) and detailed investment thesis for each position.
